message:
fix: type-safe ErrorSource union, stable React keys in error panel

- Add ErrorSource type ("run" | "fanout") instead of bare string
- Replace array-index React key with timestamp+source composite key
  to prevent rendering bugs when the error list shifts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
